case_title: BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC VS. MANVEER SINGH ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGH, MANVEER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Steve Naumchik, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Block 6 Joint Venture LLC.
Witnesses Claire Eberts and Juan Paniagua sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Manveer Singh aka Manveer K. Singh.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 299 Fremont Street, Unit #3112, San Francisco, California 94105.
Damages $21,874.95.
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $335.00
For a Total Judgment of $22,209.95
Judgment signed in open court.
